capabilities_used.evidence: [2025-11-21] "Bitcoin has always topped in Q4 of the post-halving year and then bottomed approximately 1 year later." 这是典型减半后阶段划分。
[2025-11-20] "Bitcoin bear markets usually last 1 year. Potential low in October 2026." 以及 [2026-03-27] "You can't use prior midterm years..."，持续用历史周期模板推演未来。
高频讨论 BTC.D：[2025-09-30] "oh look Bitcoin dominance is going higher"；[2025-04-30] "New cycle high by #Bitcoin Dominance"；图片 4/7 直接拿 "Making another BTC dominance video" 自嘲，说明这是其核心框架。
[2024-09-30] "#BTC has already pulled back to its 20W SMA"；图片 3 显示 BTC 周线沿 bull market support band/均线带运行，典型用趋势回踩均线延续框架。
[2025-03-28] "#BTC starts dumping into the upcoming death cross. What typically happens is a dump into the cross, and then a countertrend rally on the other side of the cross"，明确把死叉作为趋势阶段信号。
[2025-11-19] "If Bitcoin can back above the 50W SMA within the next week then I’ll take the bear goggles off." 他把关键周均线的收复/失守作为 regime 切换确认。
[2024-12-30] "When the 10Y yield broke out and retested its 21W EMA in 2023, we also saw #BTC pull back and consolidate for a while." 明确用收益率走势解释 BTC 流动性环境。
[2025-01-31] "Spot the bubbles... SP:SPX/FRED:UNRATE..."；[2024-08-29] 给出 SPX/失业率/利率复合公式，用股市风险偏好与宏观变量给 BTC 定位。
虽然没直接发 PMI 数值，但他反复用 labor market / recession / GDP 变化来判断风险周期，如 [2025-04-30] "Real GDP dropped -0.3% in Q1 2025"、[2025-01-30] "no recession until initial claims are >300k"。本质是宏观周期状态判断。
[2024-11-26] "If GOLD rallies just 350,000%, then it will only be down 99.99% against #Bitcoin"；图片 2 是 GOLD/BTC 长期比价图，说明他经常把 BTC 放到跨资产相对价值框架里。
[2025-11-19] "Ethereum will likely continue bleeding against Bitcoin until December."；图片 8 是 ETH/BTC 周线多年下行结构，说明他长期识别 ALT/BTC 和 ETH/BTC 的下降 regime。
图片 3 的 BTC 周线保持在支撑带上方、结构高低点抬升；[2024-10-31] 提到若收盘站稳 70k 上方则周期观点有效，本质是趋势结构确认。
[2024-05-24] "So since the ETF for #ETH is approved..." 虽然不是主框架，但会把 ETF 作为制度性流动性变量纳入判断。
他大量跟踪 Powell、利率、就业数据与会议周风险：[2025-10-29] 多条 Powell 逐句转发；[2024-09-30]、[2025-01-31] 反复提 labor market releases 对 BTC 的影响。
[2025-11-19] "One sign of a cycle being over is when you get to 'Extreme Fear' and no bounces occur." 这类表述体现他不主张在未确认前盲目抄底。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Bull Market Support Band
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use the weekly bull market support band, typically the 20W SMA/21W EMA zone, as the primary trend support. Holding it supports continuation; losing it implies a deeper corrective or bearish phase.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用周线牛市支撑带（通常是 20 周均线与 21 周 EMA 区域）作为主趋势分界。守住偏延续，失守偏更深回调或熊市阶段。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-06-25] "#BTC now at its 21W EMA"；[2024-06-25] "#BTC dominance still holding support above its bull market support band"；图片 3 也直接展示该带。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Logarithmic Regression Band Extremes
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Map BTC, ETH, or ETH/BTC into logarithmic regression bands to identify overextension, fair value, and likely mean-reversion zones across cycles.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把 BTC、ETH 或 ETH/BTC 放进对数回归带中，识别过热、合理价值和跨周期均值回归区域。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-02-28] "#ETH is moving deeper into its lower logarithmic regression band"；[2025-12-31] "According to this model, the current 'fair value' of ETH is $1987."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Midterm Year Seasonal Template
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 中期选举年季节性模板
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Project BTC path using U.S. midterm-year analogs: common pattern is February low, March lower high, and April weakness, with macro relief later in the year.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用美国中期选举年类比推演 BTC 路径：常见路径是 2 月低点、3 月更低高点、4 月再探底，随后年内再看宏观缓和窗口。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-04-02] "Bitcoin tends to find a low in February, lower high in March, then it drops back down in April in midterm years."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Alt/BTC Reckoning
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 山寨对 BTC 清算期
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When Alt/BTC pairs are rejected from prior support turned resistance or from the bull market support band, expect another leg of underperformance versus BTC rather than early altseason.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当 ALT/BTC 在前支撑变阻力或牛市支撑带被拒绝时，预期其相对 BTC 再走一轮弱势，而不是抢跑山寨季。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-09-25] "If they get rejected by the bull market support band... then it should lead to another move down by ALT/BTC pairs"；[2025-05-31] "#ALT / #BTC pairs were rejected from their bull market support band"。

personal_quirks.quote: Didn’t listen to the speech.  Because I don’t need a narrative
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 优先价格结构与周期模板，不依赖新闻叙事解释每一根 K 线。

personal_quirks.quote: The blueprint was there for Bitcoin.   It drives people crazy though that it was that easy.  No need to overcomplicate things
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 市场往往按历史模板运行，框架越简洁越有用，不要过度复杂化。

personal_quirks.quote: Please stop getting upset about my posts about the altcoin recknoning.  I'm clearly not talking about your altcoin.  I'm talking about everyone else's altcoin.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认对山寨相对 BTC 保持怀疑，拒绝个别项目叙事干扰大结构判断。

personal_quirks.quote: One sign of a cycle being over is when you get to "Extreme Fear" and no bounces occur.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 情绪极端本身不是抄底信号；若极恐都没有反弹，通常说明趋势已经坏掉。
他经常把存活者偏差、市场清洗和参与者流失当作周期状态的一部分来观察。

unique_traits: 他和普通 TA 交易员最大的区别，是把 BTC/ETH 图表放进更大的周期模板里看：减半周期、四年周期、美国中期年、就业与收益率。第二，他极度强调 BTC.D、ETH/BTC、ALT/BTC 这些相对强弱图，而不是只盯美元计价绝对价格。第三，他的表达像内容创作者，但底层框架其实很系统：周线均线带 + 历史类比 + 宏观流动性。

high_conviction_phrases: the final rotation to BTC is about to start
low_conviction_phrases: base case for now though as I see it
